description_long: This is a cluster of modern office buildings arranged on a rectangular city block, featuring a mix of mid-rise and high-rise structures. The tallest building is a sleek, glass-and-concrete tower with horizontal strip windows, flanked by several shorter buildings with similar window patterns and flat roofs. The facades are dominated by alternating bands of glass and light-colored concrete, giving a clean, contemporary appearance. A rooftop helipad is visible on one of the lower buildings, and the ground level includes paved walkways and small plazas between the structures. The windows are arranged in regular, horizontal rows, and the overall layout suggests a planned business complex. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a functional, International Style design.
description: A group of modern office buildings with glass and concrete facades, featuring a tall central tower and several mid-rise structures arranged around paved plazas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main plaza, the tallest tower, and a rooftop helipad on a lower building.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roofs and the back facades of the buildings, with less visible detail on the plaza.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the main entrance area, the central tower, and the regular window patterns across all buildings.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the cluster arrangement, rooftop details, and the helipad, with a clear view of the paved ground level.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal strip windows, evenly spaced and repeated across all facades.
